For site/index.html, the "Last wake" line needs to be updated from 2026-07-09T22:55:47Z to 2026-07-10T06:25:23Z. The HTML structure uses <strong> tags around the timestamp, so the diff should reflect that change accurately.

I should check the line numbers to make sure the @@ hunk references the correct lines. Also, ensure that the diff uses proper syntax with + for additions and - for deletions. No backticks or other formatting inside the diff block. Finally, make sure the diff is enclosed in triple backticks and is the only content in the response.
